title: Quadlet - restore pod name to not use systemd specifiers
body:
Update the docs to reflect the default naming of resources

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet - do not use systemd specifier in pod names
```
Resolves: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/26105

comments.body:
Style wise I would suggest you use `git revert` to clearly mark the other commit as broken and the add another commit for the docs.

Also please include the issue number in the commit not just the PR description, i.e. add `Fixes: #26105`
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#describe-your-changes-in-commit-messages
